raw_text: Aryan Thakur Email: rn23thakur@gmail.com Mobile: +91-9867541809 LinkedIn: aryan-thakur Education Birla Institute of Technology and Science BITS Pilani  Goa Campus Goa, India GPA: 7.4/10.0 Aug 2021  May 2026 B.E. Electronics  Instrumentation |B.E. Mechanical Hiranandani Foundation School Thane, India ICSE: 95.8 |ISC: 92.8 2019  2021 Experience Nurix AI Bengaluru, India Software Engineering Intern Jun 2025  Present Developed backend services forABCL s outbound Voice AI agents , including scheduling/rescheduling APIs, in-call SMS delivery, post-call rescheduler, and automated lead reconciliation into their CRM. Evaluated LLM orchestration frameworks LiteLLM and others , leading to the adoption of Bifrost , a high-performance orchestrator deployed across AWS regions for low-latency, scalable model access. Integrated Azure STT and Hume TTS into the agentic platform, extending multimodal voice agent capabilities in production. BITS Pilani, Goa Campus Goa, India Teaching Assistant Aug 2023  May 2025 Assisted instruction for Digital Design  Engineering Graphics Verilog, AutoCAD and Introduction to Logic Coursera BITS Online Program . Projects PID Controller for Ball and Beam System  Python, Control Systems, OpenAI Gym : Developed and implemented a PID controller in the BallBeamSetpoint-v0 environment. Tuned PID parameters Kp, Ki, Kd for stable control of the ball s position relative to a setpoint. Analyzed system response and visualized control performance using NumPy and Matplotlib. SCARA Robot Arm Design  Robotics, Embedded Systems : Designed and built a SCARA robot arm Dec 2021  Feb 2022 using BLDC motors with a custom motor controller and belt-driven mechanism for stability and reduced motor load. Fabricated with 3D printed PLA, aluminum, steel, and carbon fiber to achieve a strong yet lightweight structure. Integrated innovative gripper mechanisms to enhance manipulation performance. CPU Scheduling Algorithms Simulator  C++ OOP, STL : Implemented FCFS, Round Robin, SJF, MLQ, and Priority Scheduling with aging. Applied OOP principles for modularity, leveraged STL data structures for efficiency, and designed performance metrics to evaluate algorithms. Skills Programming  Simulation : Python, C++, MATLAB/Simulink, Cadence Virtuoso Electronics  PCB : Control Systems, Embedded Systems, PCB Design KiCad , Circuit Prototyping Tools  Instrumentation : FPGA s, Git, Linux Extracurricular Activities Electronics and Robotics Club  Core Team Member : Organized workshops, competitions, and hackathons; led 3+ robotics projects inverted pendulum robot, robotic arm , developed automation solutions using microcontrollers, and mentored 50+ students in circuit design and programming. Basketball : Led school team to victory in the District Sports Office DSO Championship; served as Hostel Captain, guiding the team to Interhostel Finals.
